stm:metadata.name: dc:title
stm:metadata.content: 3d-metal example: geometry optimization then frequency (start from off geometry)

atoms.xlink:href: #xpointer(//molecule[@id='M1A1C2B4']//atom[@id='a3' or @id='a4' or @id='a6' or @id='a7' or @id='a9' or @id='a10' or @id='a12' or @id='a13' or @id='a15' or @id='a16' or @id='a18' or @id='a19'])
#xpointer(//molecule[@id='M79FF7C1']//atom[@id='a3' or @id='a4' or @id='a6' or @id='a7' or @id='a9' or @id='a10' or @id='a12' or @id='a13' or @id='a15' or @id='a16' or @id='a18' or @id='a19'])

error.message: Low rotational temperature. Assumption of classical rotation may no longer be valid
Using the 23 vibrational modes with wavenumbers < 1000 [1/cm] may cause significant error at T=200.0 [K]: Use 0.5*RT instead.
Low rotational temperature. Assumption of classical rotation may no longer be valid
Using the 26 vibrational modes with wavenumbers < 1000 [1/cm] may cause significant error at T=250.0 [K]: Use 0.5*RT instead.
Low rotational temperature. Assumption of classical rotation may no longer be valid
Using the 32 vibrational modes with wavenumbers < 1000 [1/cm] may cause significant error at T=300.0 [K]: Use 0.5*RT instead.
Low rotational temperature. Assumption of classical rotation may no longer be valid
Using the 32 vibrational modes with wavenumbers < 1000 [1/cm] may cause significant error at T=350.0 [K]: Use 0.5*RT instead.
Low rotational temperature. Assumption of classical rotation may no longer be valid
Using the 32 vibrational modes with wavenumbers < 1000 [1/cm] may cause significant error at T=400.0 [K]: Use 0.5*RT instead.

input.p: ***,3d-metal example: geometry optimization then frequency (start from off geometry)
symmetry,nosym ! disable point-group symmetry to avoid symmetry-convergence problems
default,cc-pVDZ ! basis for main-group atoms (fast for initial optim)
{uhf;wf,,,4} ! start an unrestricted HF (good for open-shell 3d metals)
print,low ! print frequencies+modes of zero frequencies
